name: Queen of Pain
description: They say pain is all in the mind, but they're wrong: It's all in my hands.

abilities.name: Succubus
abilities.description: The closer the enemy units, the stronger the Akasha's spell lifesteal for herself is. Spell Lifesteal also works with Pure damage sourced to Akasha.

abilities.name: Shadow Strike
abilities.description: Hurls a poisoned dagger that deals first damage to the unit-targeted enemy, then applies damage over time with a movement speed slow. The damage over time is inflicted again in fixed intervals after the first damage.

abilities.name: Blink
abilities.description: Releases a sonic boom, deals damage and silences affected enemy units within the radius when Akasha blinks, at both her starting and ending locations.

abilities.name: Scream of Pain
abilities.description: The sultry voice of Akasha beckons her opponents while stealing their souls.

abilities.name: Sonic Wave
abilities.description: Creates a gigantic wave of sound in front of Akasha, dealing heavy damage to all enemy units in its wake and pushing them back.
